heading: Actions to avoid acts detrimental to creditors
label: 1523 Actions to avoid acts detrimental to creditors

amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and not applicable with respect to cases commenced under this title before such effective date, except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2005 Amendment note under .Apr. 20, 2005section 1501 of Pub. L. 109–8section 101 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Upon recognition of a foreign proceeding, the foreign representative has standing in a case concerning the debtor pending under another chapter of this title to initiate actions under sections 522, 544, 545, 547, 548, 550, 553, and 724(a).

children.label: b
children.text: When a foreign proceeding is a foreign nonmain proceeding, the court must be satisfied that an action under subsection (a) relates to assets that, under United States law, should be administered in the foreign nonmain proceeding.
